description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Train service between Tung Chung and Sunny Bay ends earlier on 26 October
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 10月26日東涌綫來往東涌及欣澳列車服務提早完結

2024-10-19T15:06:00.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate the Tung Chung Line Extension work, Tung Chung Line train service between Tung Chung and Sunny Bay will end early on Saturday 26 October. From Tung Chung to Hong Kong 23:01 From Hong Kong to Tung Chung 23:07 Train service between Hong Kong and Sunny Bay, as well as the Airport Express, will remain normal. After the last train departs, free shuttle buses will be provided between Tung Chung and Sunny Bay stations by MTR Corporation Limited. The estimated journey time is 20-30 minutes, with a frequency of 3-9 minutes. Departure time of the last bus: From Tung Chung 00:43* From Sunny Bay 01:18 *To take the train towards Hong Kong from Sunny Bay, please take the shuttle bus before 00:18.
2024-10-19T15:06:00.CONTENT_CN: 為配合東涌綫延綫工程，於10月26日(星期六)，東涌綫來往東涌及欣澳的列車服務將提早完結。 由東涌往香港站 23:01 由香港站往東涌 23:07 香港站至欣澳及機場快綫服務正常。 尾班列車開出後，港鐵公司將提供免費接駁巴士來往東涌及欣澳，預計車程為20-30 分鐘，班次為3-9 分鐘一班。 最後一班巴士開出時間： 東涌開出 00:43* 欣澳開出 01:18 *如需乘搭由欣澳開往香港站方向的列車，請乘搭00:18前開出的接駁巴士。

2024-10-19T17:21:00.CONTENT_EN: To facilitate the Tung Chung Line Extension work, Tung Chung Line train service between Tung Chung and Sunny Bay will end early on Saturday 26 October. From Tung Chung to Hong Kong 23:01 From Hong Kong to Tung Chung 23:07 Train service between Hong Kong and Sunny Bay, as well as the Airport Express, will remain normal. Free shuttle buses will be provided between Tung Chung and Sunny Bay stations by MTR Corporation Limited. The estimated journey time is 20-30 minutes, with a frequency of 3-9 minutes. Departure time of the last bus: From Tung Chung 00:43* From Sunny Bay 01:18 *To take the train towards Hong Kong from Sunny Bay, please take the shuttle bus before 00:18.

2024-10-20T13:46:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Island Road (Aberdeen bound) near Deep Water Bay is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.

2024-10-20T13:50:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , the one-lane-two-way traffic arrangement is being implemented on Island Road near Deep Water Bay. Traffic is busy now.
2024-10-20T13:50:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，香島道近深水灣現已實施單線雙程行車措施。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-10-20T15:30:00.CONTENT_EN: The one-lane-two-way traffic arrangement which was implemented on Island Road near Deep Water Bay due to traffic accident is now cancelled.
2024-10-20T15:30:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而於香島道近深水灣實施的單線雙程行車措施現已取消。

2024-10-20T14:56:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle breakdown , the tunnel tube fast lane of Western Harbour Crossing (Hong Kong Island bound) is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-10-20T14:56:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛故障，西區海底隧道(往香港島方向)的管道快線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-10-20T14:59:00.CONTENT_EN: The tunnel tube fast lane of Western Harbour Crossing (Hong Kong Island bound) which was closed due to vehicle breakdown is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-10-20T14:59:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因車輛故障而封閉的西區海底隧道(往香港島方向)的管道快線現已解封。

2024-10-20T15:58:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle breakdown , the fast lane of Waterloo Road flyover (Lion Rock Tunnel bound) near Prince Edward Road West is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-10-20T15:58:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛故障，窩打老道天橋(往獅子山隧道方向)近太子道西的快線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-10-20T16:23:00.CONTENT_EN: The fast lane of Waterloo Road flyover (Lion Rock Tunnel bound) near Prince Edward Road West which was closed due to vehicle breakdown is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-10-20T16:23:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因車輛故障而封閉的窩打老道天橋(往獅子山隧道方向)近太子道西的快線現已解封。

2024-10-20T16:45:00.CONTENT_EN: All car parks at West Kowloon Cultural District are full. Members of the public are encouraged to take public transport to the West Kowloon Cultural District.
2024-10-20T16:45:00.CONTENT_CN: 西九文化區內所有停車場現已泊滿車輛，前往西九文化區一帶的市民請使用公共交通工具。

2024-10-20T16:51:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , the one-lane-two-way traffic arrangement is being implemented on Harbour Road near Kong Wan Fire Station. Affected Citybus Route no. 88R (City One bound), Cross Harbour Bus Route no. 905 and 978 (Exhibition Centre Station bound) have been diverted. Traffic is busy now.
2024-10-20T16:51:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，港灣道近港灣消防局現已實施單線雙程行車措施。 受影響城巴第88R號(往沙田第一城方向)、隧巴第905及978號路線(往會展方向)須改道行駛。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-10-20T17:11:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , all lanes of Harbour Road (Causeway Bay bound) between Fenwick Street and Fleming Road are closed to all traffic. Vehicles from Fenwick Street (Causeway Bay bound) cannot enter Harbour Road. At the same time, part of the lanes of Harbour Road (Central bound) between Fenwick Street and Fleming Road is closed. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Affected Citybus Route no. 88R (City One bound), Cross Harbour Bus Route no. 905 and 978 (Exhibition Centre Station bound) have been diverted. Traffic is busy now.
2024-10-20T17:11:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，港灣道(往銅鑼灣方向)介乎分域街與菲林明道之間的全線現已封閉。 分域街(往銅鑼灣方向)車輛亦不能駛入港灣道。 同時，港灣道(往中環方向)介乎分域街與菲林明道的部分行車線已封閉。駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 受影響城巴第88R號(往沙田第一城方向)、隧巴第905及978號路線(往會展方向)須改道行駛。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-10-20T18:44:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , part of the lanes of Texaco Road (Tsing Yi bound) near Tak Tai Path is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-10-20T18:44:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，德士古道(往青衣方向)近德大徑的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-10-20T19:17:00.CONTENT_EN: Part of the lanes of Texaco Road (Tsing Yi bound) near Tak Tai Path which was closed due to traffic accident is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-10-20T19:17:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的德士古道(往青衣方向)近德大徑的部份行車線現已解封。
